title: Rebase existing sim routes under /sim and add top-level home plus practice skeleton routes
goal: Move the current sim site under /sim/* without changing its behavior, and add a new top-level home page plus practice skeleton routes for the separated practice site.
constraints: Keep existing sim admin and in-game logic unchanged
Practice pages must remain physically separated from sim pages
acceptance: Existing sim login and flows work under /sim/*
ProtectedRoute and PublicOnlyRoute redirect to /sim/* paths correctly
New placeholder pages do not use inline style hardcoding
